message:
refactor(web): migrate VPS wizard IP validation to Zod schema validators

Replace inline onChange/onBlur/onSubmit validator functions with Zod
schema refinements via @tanstack/zod-form-adapter. This removes ~25
lines of duplicated validation logic across three events and provides
consistent validation behavior with proper type inference.

- Add zodValidator() adapter to the form config
- Replace three verbose validator functions with z.string().refine()
- onSubmit adds z.string().min(1) for required-field validation
- Add zod and @tanstack/zod-form-adapter imports
- Update package.json and bun.lock for new dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
